text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp, a period
of intense training where runners can improve
their skills.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, it's so hot! The glare of the sun is making
me all woozy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...But I've heard that training in the heat of
summer goes a long way towards getting stronger!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta work harder than ever if I'm aiming for
the Kikuka Sho and the spring Tenno Sho!
choice_data_list: I'm sure your rival is working just as hard.
I'm sure your rival is working just as hard.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, give me everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... in exchange for my hard work, will you
let me have two ice creams a day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins our intense summer camp.
